title: Room Appearance Settings UI
summary: Adds a Room Visual Theme section to the Room Settings panel, letting room admins set header/messages background colours and decorations policy. Settings are persisted to the room appearance file.

changes.description: Added _rspRoomAppearance state variable (reset on closeRoomSettings). Room appearance is pre-loaded via loadRoomAppearance at panel open time.
Added 'Room Visual Theme' section with colour pickers + hex text inputs for: headerBg, headerTextColor, msgsBg. Colour picker and hex input stay in sync; Clear buttons empty the hex field.
Added 'Allow user decorations' toggle (rsbAllowUserDecorations) in the Room Visual Theme section — controls whether user cosmetics (name glow, bubble effects) render in the room.
Save handler now reads rsbHeaderBgHex, rsbHeaderTextColorHex, rsbMsgsBgHex, rsbAllowUserDecorations and writes them to roomAppearancePath(room) via ghPutJson.
After saving, _roomAppearanceCache[room] is updated and applyRoomAppearance is called so changes take effect immediately for the saving admin.
